name: wait_for_user
description: Pauses the agent and shows a banner in the browser asking the user to perform an action (like logging in). The agent waits up to 120 seconds for the user to click 'Done'.
instructions: This is a BUILT-IN agent action. Use action 'wait_for_user' with message='Please log in to your account'. A purple banner appears in the browser with a Done button. The agent resumes automatically after the user clicks Done or after 120 seconds.
